records.m_Talk_ENG: Sir Carantisir... Why are you here, after all this time?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sir Carantisir... Why are you here, after all this time?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sir Carantisir... Why are you here, after all this time?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you even picking a fight with me?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you even picking a fight with me?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you even picking a fight with me?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even insolence has its limits, kid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even insolence has its limits, kid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even insolence has its limits, kid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You think this is a fight? That you and I are equals?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You think this is a fight? That you and I are equals?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You think this is a fight? That you and I are equals?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I expected more from the blood of a former captain, but I suppose this is your limit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I expected more from the blood of a former captain, but I suppose this is your limit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I expected more from the blood of a former captain, but I suppose this is your limit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pathetic. At least your brother had real skill.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pathetic. At least your brother had real skill.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pathetic. At least your brother had real skill.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If this is what the Captain and Deputy amount to, there's no need to bother with the rest.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If this is what the Captain and Deputy amount to, there's no need to bother with the rest.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If this is what the Captain and Deputy amount to, there's no need to bother with the rest.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Deputy...? You mean Dame Fione?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Deputy...? You mean Dame Fione?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Deputy...? You mean Dame Fione?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What did you do to her?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What did you do to her?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What did you do to her?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I broke her bones and crushed her flesh, so she'd learn her place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I broke her bones and crushed her flesh, so she'd learn her place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I broke her bones and crushed her flesh, so she'd learn her place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Didn't realize it when she swung that Armament. But seeing her crawl on the ground, she really was a scorpion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Didn't realize it when she swung that Armament. But seeing her crawl on the ground, she really was a scorpion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Didn't realize it when she swung that Armament. But seeing her crawl on the ground, she really was a scorpion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you saying... Red Shift attacked one of its own?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you saying... Red Shift attacked one of its own?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you saying... Red Shift attacked one of its own?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah. One of its own?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah. One of its own?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah. One of its own?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't make me laugh. The Order is nothing but a pack of fools blindly clinging to outdated traditions.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't make me laugh. The Order is nothing but a pack of fools blindly clinging to outdated traditions.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't make me laugh. The Order is nothing but a pack of fools blindly clinging to outdated traditions.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And if chasing scattered starlight brought you to this pathetic reality...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And if chasing scattered starlight brought you to this pathetic reality...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And if chasing scattered starlight brought you to this pathetic reality...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then someone needs to break the mold and correct our forebears' mistakes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then someone needs to break the mold and correct our forebears' mistakes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then someone needs to break the mold and correct our forebears' mistakes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And that starts by unleashing the Armaments through proper succession.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And that starts by unleashing the Armaments through proper succession.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And that starts by unleashing the Armaments through proper succession.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ack... *Cough!* *Gasp...!*
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ack... *Cough!* *Gasp...!*
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ack... *Cough!* *Gasp...!*

records.m_Talk_ENG: You... How could you possibly know about that...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You... How could you possibly know about that...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You... How could you possibly know about that...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fool. You thought you were the only one who read the memories of the stars?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fool. You thought you were the only one who read the memories of the stars?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fool. You thought you were the only one who read the memories of the stars?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If your little stunt amounted to this, there's no point talking further.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If your little stunt amounted to this, there's no point talking further.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If your little stunt amounted to this, there's no point talking further.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Goodbye, kid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Goodbye, kid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Goodbye, kid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Looks like I'll have to take back what I said before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Looks like I'll have to take back what I said before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Looks like I'll have to take back what I said before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Red Shift seems to need more time to accept you as their captain...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Red Shift seems to need more time to accept you as their captain...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Red Shift seems to need more time to accept you as their captain...

records.m_Talk_ENG: A familiar shadow blocked the body, hinting at a man who couldn't possibly be here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A familiar shadow blocked the body, hinting at a man who couldn't possibly be here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A familiar shadow blocked the body, hinting at a man who couldn't possibly be here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For a moment, time seemed to stop.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For a moment, time seemed to stop.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For a moment, time seemed to stop.

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-why...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-why...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-why...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not unusual for friends to share one another's burdens.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not unusual for friends to share one another's burdens.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not unusual for friends to share one another's burdens.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And if you're still trapped in a nightmare, then I'll be the one to pull you out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And if you're still trapped in a nightmare, then I'll be the one to pull you out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And if you're still trapped in a nightmare, then I'll be the one to pull you out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Get up, Esterosa.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Get up, Esterosa.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Get up, Esterosa.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Remember the vow you made, and face duty.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Remember the vow you made, and face duty.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Remember the vow you made, and face duty.
